files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_alloc_insert_boundary_v1: allocate low extents, allocate u32max tail, insert before tail, map tail

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_allocator_pressure_v1: repeated low-domain allocations force tree growth and metadata writes

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_high_boundary_ops_v1: u32 boundary logical starts with one-block and sixteen-block counts

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_insert_collapse_roundtrip_v1: insert sparse gap and collapse it back around mapped extents

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_interleave_mark_punch_v1: unwritten allocation mixed with mark_written and punch_hole

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_low_dense_ops_v1: dense low logical alloc, mark, punch, insert, collapse, remap loop

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_punch_collapse_v1: allocate dense low extents, punch middle, collapse remaining tail

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_sparse_map_v1: map sparse low and high logical ranges without prior allocation

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_tail_shift_v1: allocate high tail extents then exercise insert and collapse shifts

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+P_unwritten_mark_v1: allocate unwritten low ranges, mark partial written, map probes
